targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'added' AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'added');

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'removed' AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'removed');

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'increased' AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'increased');

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'decreased' AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'decreased');

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'added' AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'added')) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'removed' AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'removed')) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'increased' AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'increased')) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'decreased' AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type = 'decreased')) AS value;

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type IN ('added', 'removed') AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type = 'week' AND list_type IN ('added', 'removed'))) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings)), 0), 1) AS value;

SELECT symbol AS "Symbol", ROUND(weight_start_pct, 2) AS "Start %", ROUND(weight_end_pct, 2) AS "End %", ROUND(weight_delta_pct, 2) AS "Delta %", ROUND(start_market_value, 0) AS "Start MV", ROUND(end_market_value, 0) AS "End MV", ROUND(market_value_delta, 0) AS "MV Delta" FROM period_holding_changes WHERE period_type = 'week' AND period_end_date = (SELECT MAX(period_end_date) FROM period_holding_changes WHERE period_type = 'week') ORDER BY ABS(weight_delta_pct) DESC LIMIT 10;
